prerequisites: Access to a Teradata Vantage instance (free Vantage Express editions are available on Google Cloud, Azure, AWS, or via local virtualization).
A dedicated database user with permissions to create tables and write data (the docs show creating a user such as airbyte_user with PERM space and granting the privileges it needs).
Network access from Polymetrics to the Teradata host (the host domain name set in the 'host' field).
The host domain name of the Teradata Vantage instance for the required 'host' config field.

authMethods.name: Username and password (logon mechanism)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Teradata database user and the secret 'logmech.password'. The 'logmech' config field selects the logon mechanism and supports TD2 (the default), LDAP, and BROWSER. The password is supplied via the secret field.

authMethods.name: SSL/TLS with CA certificate
authMethods.summary: Optional transport security configured through the 'ssl' and 'ssl_mode' config fields. Enable 'ssl' to use an SSL connection and set 'ssl_mode' to the desired mode. A trusted CA certificate can be supplied via the secret field 'ssl_mode.ssl_ca_certificate' so the driver can validate the server certificate.

setupSteps.title: Provision a Teradata Vantage user
setupSteps.body: On your Teradata Vantage instance, create or designate a database user that has permission to create tables and write data. The Airbyte docs illustrate creating a dedicated user (for example airbyte_user) with PERM space and the required grants. Note the host domain name of the instance.

setupSteps.title: Set the host and logon mechanism
setupSteps.body: Enter the Teradata Vantage host domain name in the required 'host' field. Set 'logmech' to the logon mechanism for your environment: TD2 (the default) for native Teradata credentials, LDAP, or BROWSER. Provide the database password in the 'logmech.password' secret field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the target schema
setupSteps.body: Set 'schema' to the default database schema used to resolve unqualified object names (it defaults to public). Optionally set 'raw_data_schema' to control where internal raw tables are written (it defaults to airbyte_internal).

setupSteps.title: Configure SSL (optional)
setupSteps.body: Enable 'ssl' to use an SSL connection and set 'ssl_mode' to the mode for connections to the database. To have the driver validate the server certificate, paste the trusted CA certificate into the 'ssl_mode.ssl_ca_certificate' secret field.

setupSteps.title: Tune advanced options (optional)
setupSteps.body: Add extra JDBC parameters as key=value pairs (separated by &) in 'jdbc_url_params'. Use 'query_band' to set name-value pairs on the Teradata session that identify the request source. 'drop_cascade' enables cascading table drops (risk of data loss) and 'disable_type_dedupe' disables final table type deduplication; leave these at their defaults unless required.
